messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: My account has been charged twice

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me look into this right away.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I can see the duplicate charge. This was an error on our end.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I've processed a refund for the duplicate charge.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: When will I see the refund?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: It should appear in your account within 2-3 business days.
